credit_balance_in_nav.implementation: useCreditBalance() hook in sidebar footer, shows credit_balance_usd formatted as '$X.XX'
credit_balance_in_nav.display: CreditCard icon + 'Credits' label + balance amount, links to /portal/credits
credit_balance_in_nav.live_state: Shows balance.display when isLive=true, shows 'DEMO' label when isLive=false

notes: Credit balance strip added to BusinessLayout sidebar footer. Links to /portal/credits. Uses Pearl Mineral V2 tokens (accent-soft, accent, graphite). Skeleton loading state present.
